name: Tamora Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the papaya into small pieces.
2. Add the pineapple chunks to a blender.
3. Add the juice from 2 oranges and 1/2 cup of orange juice to the blender.
4. Blend at medium speed until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into pudding glasses.
6. Refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours or until firm.
7. Serve immediately.
8. If storing, cover tightly and refrigerate for up to 5 days.
